pokemon:wooper.name: Wooper
pokemon:wooper.summary: Wooper usually lives in water. However, it occasionally comes out onto land in search of food. On land, it coats its body with a gooey, toxic film.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Wooper usually lives in water. However, it occasionally comes out onto land in search of food. On land, it coats its body with a gooey, toxic film.
When walking on land, it covers its body with a poisonous film that keeps its skin from dehydrating.
When walking on land, it covers its body with a poisonous film that keeps its skin from dehydrating.
A mucous membrane covers its body. Touching it barehanded will cause a shooting pain.
It lives in cold water, half burying itself in mud at the bottom to sleep.
WOOPER usually live in water but come out onto land seeking food occasionally. On land, they coat their bodies with a gooey, toxic film.
When it walks around on the ground, it coats its body with a slimy, poisonous film.
This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
This Pokémon lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
Wooper usually lives in water. However, it occasionally comes out onto land in search of food. On land, it coats its body with a gooey, toxic film.
When the temperature cools in the evening, they emerge from water to seek food along the shore.
When walking on land, it covers its body with a poisonous film that keeps its skin from dehydrating.
WOOPER usually lives in water. However, it occasionally comes out onto land in search of food. On land, it coats its body with a gooey, toxic film.

When walking on land, it covers its body with a poisonous film that keeps its skin from dehydrating.
When it walks a­ round on the ground, it coats its body with a slimy, poisonous film.
When it walks around on the ground, it coats its body with a slimy, poisonous film.
This Pokémon lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
When walking on land, it covers its body with a poisonous film that keeps its skin from dehydrating.

When the temperature cools in the evening, they emerge from water to seek food along the shore.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Wooper usually lives in water. However, it occasionally comes out onto land in search of food. On land, it coats its body with a gooey, toxic film.

pokemon:quagsire.name: Quagsire
pokemon:quagsire.summary: Quagsire hunts for food by leaving its mouth wide open in water and waiting for its prey to blunder in unaware. Because the Pokémon does not move, it does not get very hungry.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Quagsire hunts for food by leaving its mouth wide open in water and waiting for its prey to blunder in unaware. Because the Pokémon does not move, it does not get very hungry.
It has an easygoing nature. It doesn’t care if it bumps its head on boats and boulders while swimming.
It has an easygoing nature. It doesn’t care if it bumps its head on boats and boulders while swimming.
Its body is always slimy. It often bangs its head on the river bottom as it swims but seems not to care.
It has a sluggish nature. It lies at the river’s bottom, waiting for prey to stray into its mouth.
A QUAGSIRE hunts by leaving its mouth wide open in water and waiting for its prey to blunder in. Because it doesn’t move, it does not get very hungry.
Due to its relaxed and carefree attitude, it often bumps its head on boulders and boat hulls as it swims.
This carefree POKéMON has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.
This carefree Pokémon has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.
This carefree POKéMON has an easygoing nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.
Quagsire hunts for food by leaving its mouth wide open in water and waiting for its prey to blunder in unaware. Because the Pokémon does not move, it does not get very hungry.
A dim-witted Pokémon. It doesn’t care if it bumps its head into boats or rocks while swimming.
It has an easygoing nature. It doesn’t care if it bumps its head on boats and boulders while swimming.
